title: API Gateway OOMKilled
symptoms: High memory utilization leading up to crash
Increased 502/504 errors on API Gateway routes
root_cause_analysis: The API Gateway pod is exceeding a configured memory limit due to a memory leak in a recent route deployment or a sudden spike in high-payload concurrent requests.
resolution_steps: 1. View pod describe logs to confirm OOMKilled status.
2. Check grafana memory metrics for the api-gateway deployment.
3. Scale up the deployment replicas to distribute load immediately.
4. Rollback to the previous stable image if a recent deployment caused the leak.
5. If a rollback is not possible, temporarily increase the memory limits in the deployment manifest.
